# Progress

Styled progress component built on the zw-progress primitive.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/progress</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/progress
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Progress } from '@zeus-web/progress/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/progress/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop            | Type      | Default | Description                        |
| --------------- | --------- | ------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `value`         | `number`  | -       | Current progress value.            |
| `max`           | `number`  | `100`   | Maximum progress value.            |
| `indeterminate` | `boolean` | -       | Whether progress is indeterminate. |
| `label`         | `string`  | -       | Accessible progress label.         |

## Events

No public events documented.

## Slots

| Slot      | Description       |
| --------- | ----------------- |
| `default` | Optional content. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-primary`
- `bg-primary/20`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=progress-root]`
- `[data-slot=progress-indicator]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `progress` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/progress`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add progress`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Progress to represent task completion.

Do not:

- Do not use Progress as a generic loading spinner.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'\n\nexport function Example() {\n  return <Progress value={60} label="Upload progress" />\n}
```
